macaroni-soup-with-meat-and-tomato-step-.name: Macaroni Soup With Meat And Tomato Step By Step
macaroni-soup-with-meat-and-tomato-step-.original_name: Sopa de macarrones con carne y tomate paso a paso

ingredients.item: 300 g de carne molida de res con algo de grasa (80/20)
1  litro de caldo de res o de verduras
1 teaspoon of sweet peppermint or paprika

instructions: Warm the oil into a big pot. Soak the meat with high heat until it's well golden and this step is key to gain taste. Withdraw and reserve.
In the same pot sprinkle onion, garlic and carrot for 5 minutes, till soft. Add the sweet pimi and remove.
Incorpora el tomate triturado y cocina 8 minutos, para que pierda acidez y se concentre el sabor.
Give the meat back to the pot, pour the hot stock and add the bay leaf. Cooking at medium heat 15 minutes.
Add the macaroni and cook as soon as they are in the package.
Ajusta de sal y pimienta, retira la hoja de laurel y sirve con perejil fresco picado.

madisons-angel-food-cake-french-toast.name: Madison's Angel Food Cake French Toast
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Beat cake mix and water together in a bowl until moist; pour into a 10-inch tube pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until top is golden brown, cracked, and looks dry, 38 to 48 minutes. Set aside 8 hours to overnight.
Whisk eggs, milk, brown sugar, cinnamon, vanilla, and salt together in a bowl.
Cut cake into 12 slices. Dip each slice in the egg mixture to coat.
Melt enough of the butter in a large skillet over medium heat to coat the cooking surface. Cook the cake slices in batches the skillet until golden brown, 2 to 3 minutes per side.

maicena-corn-pudding.name: Maicena (corn Pudding)
instructions: Heat cornstarch in a saucepan over medium heat. Slowly stir in milk. Add sugar and salt; cook and stir until slightly thickened, about 15 minutes.

Whisk egg yolks in a bowl; stir in ¼ cornstarch mixture, then stir into pan. Cook and stir until combined, about 1 minute. Add lemon rind; cook and stir until thickened, 7 to 10 minutes. Off heat, stir in vanilla extract to combine.

make-stewed-lentils-with-chorizo-and-veg.name: Make Steamed Lentils with Chorizo) and Vegetables
make-stewed-lentils-with-chorizo-and-veg.original_name: Haz lentejas guisadas con chorizo y verduras

ingredients.item: 1 cdita de paprika o pimiento dulce

instructions: Warm up an olive oil casserole and pits garlic, onion and pepper teeth for 3 minutes.
Agrega el tomate triturado y mezcla. Cocina por 3 minutos.
Incorporates chorizo, mix and cook for another 5 minutes.
Add lentils with the cumin, salt, pepper, paprika and laurel leaf.
Vierte de 2 a 3 tazas de agua, mezcla y deja cocinar tapado a fuego medio por 30 minutos.
After that time, she incorporates the potato and carrot and rectifies salt and pepper. Mix and finish cooking for about 20 more minutes.
After cooking, get the lentils soft and soft vegetables. Once ready, let some rest to be seated and have texture. Then serve them and enjoy them.

mango-chicken-stir-fry.name: Mango Chicken Stir-fry
instructions: Combine orange juice, tomato paste, coconut aminos, chile-garlic sauce, rice vinegar, ginger, garlic, and 2 teaspoons arrowroot powder in a pint container with a well-fitting lid. Cover and shake until sauce is well combined; set aside.

Cut chicken breasts into bite-size pieces and place in a large resealable plastic bag. Add salt, white pepper, and 1 tablespoon arrowroot to the bag; seal bag and gently squeeze contents until chicken is well-coated.
Heat 1 tablespoon avocado oil in a large non-stick skillet or wok over medium-high heat until hot.

Add chicken pieces in a single layer and cook for about 1 minute. Using tongs, turn chicken and begin to stir. Move chicken quickly around in the skillet and turn so all sides will come in contact with the skillet and begin to brown, about 5 minutes.

Continue stir-frying until chicken is no longer pink in the center and the juices run clear, about 5 more minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read 162 to 74°C (72 to 74 degrees C). Remove chicken pieces to a plate and keep warm

Heat the remaining tablespoon of oil in the same skillet until hot. Add onion, bell pepper, broccoli, and red pepper and cook, stirring, until vegetables are brightly colored but still crisp, about 3 minutes. Stir in mango pieces.
Shake sauce again, and pour into the skillet, stirring quickly and constantly until sauce thickens, about 1 minute. Return chicken pieces to the skillet.
Turn off heat and allow residual heat to continue cooking the stir-fry until vegetables are crisp-tender, 1 to 2 more minutes.

mango-salsa.name: Mango Salsa

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Place 1 ripe large mango, cut into about ½" pieces, 1 small red onion, finely chopped, 1 small jalapeño, thinly sliced, ½ cup coarsely chopped cilantro, ¼ cup cherry tomatoes, quartered (if using), and 1 Tbsp. plus 1½ tsp. fresh lime juice in a bowl. Season with 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt and toss to combine.

maple-tarte-tartin.name: Maple Tarte Tartin

ingredients.prep: Pink Lady, or Honeycrisp apples (about 2 1/2 pounds), peeled, cored, halved

instructions: Unfold puff pastry on a lightly floured surface. Using a lightly floured rolling pin, roll into a 12" square about 1/8" thick. Using a 12" plate as a guide, cut out a 12" round with a sharp paring knife. Transfer pastry round to a baking sheet; cover with plastic wrap and chill until ready to use.

Preheat oven to 425°. Swirl butter and maple syrup in a 12" heavy ovenproof skillet over medium heat until butter melts. Sprinkle sugar over, evenly coating bottom of skillet. Add apples, cut side down; increase heat to medium-high and cook until sugar melts, occasionally swirling apples in pan, about 5 minutes. Reduce heat to medium and cook, continuing to swirl apples in pan, about 5 minutes longer. Flip apples (rounded side down), and cook, swirling apples occasionally, until syrup is thick and golden brown, 5–10 minutes longer.

Cover apples with pastry round, tucking in edges of pastry. Bake until pastry is light golden brown, about 10 minutes. Reduce heat to 375°; bake until pastry is puffed and deep golden, about 20 minutes longer.

Let tarte tatin cool for 15 minutes. Invert a serving plate over skillet. Using oven mitts, firmly hold plate and skillet and invert tarte onto plate. Remove skillet; rearrange apples if needed and scrape any caramel in skillet over. Serve warm or at room temperature with ice cream.

margarita-argiro.name: Margarita

ingredients.item: 50 ml white tequila from 100% blue agave
10 ml sugar syrup (1:1) (or agave organic syrup)
Salt for the rim of the glass
1 femme to garnish and salt the glass
50 ml white tequila from 100% blue agave
10 ml sugar syrup (1:1) (or agave organic syrup)
Salt for the rim of the glass
1 femme to garnish and salt the glass

instructions: For the classic margarita cocktail, we will use a glass of margarita classic or cup of coupe type.
First fill the glass with ice cubes and let it freeze. We can also put some glasses in the freezer to freeze one to two hours before we start making our drink.
We put all the liquid ingredients in a shaker.
Add a lot of ice to the shaker rim.
Seal the shaker well and beat for about 20 to 25 seconds until we feel that our drink is well frozen.
We pour the ice out of the glass we frozen.
We pass a lime wedge around the rim of the glass to stick the salt onto it easily.
Then add some salt to a saucer.
Put up the rim of the glass and salt it. Put the glass on the salt from the outer side always, so that the salt does not fall into our glass.
Then gently beat the glass and shake the excess salt from the rim.
Salt is optional. If we want less salt, we can only put on half the rim of the glass.
Empty the shaker's contents into the glass that we prepared, squeezing it with a simple tea strainer or any household roller.
We do this to filter our drink from the ice chips that will melt very quickly and water our cocktail. We also filter the fibers from the lime juice we have squeezed for our recipe.
Garnish the cocktail with a lime wedge and enjoy!
We can enjoy the margarita during dinner. It's the perfect match in the Mexican cuisine.

marinated-artichoke-and-pancetta-pasta.name: Marinated Artichoke And Pancetta Pasta
instructions: Cook 12 oz. spaghetti in a large pot of boiling salted water until very al dente, about 1 minute less than package directions. Drain, reserving 2 cups pasta cooking liquid.

Meanwhile, place 4 oz. pancetta (Italian bacon), cut into ¼" pieces, in a cold, dry medium Dutch oven or other heavy pot and set over medium-high heat. Cook pancetta, stirring often, until browned and crisp, about 5 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer pancetta to a small bowl, leaving fat behind in pot.

Pour extra-virgin olive oil into fat in pot so you have 3 Tbsp. total. Arrange two 12-oz. jars marinated quartered artichoke hearts, drained, in a single layer in pot and cook over medium-high heat, undisturbed, until golden brown underneath, 6–8 minutes. Add 4 garlic cloves, thinly sliced, and ¼ tsp. crushed red pepper flakes and season with freshly ground black pepper. Cook, stirring often, until fragrant, about 2 minutes.

Reduce heat to medium. Add pasta, 2 oz. Parmesan, finely grated (about 1 cup), 4 Tbsp. unsalted butter, and 1 cup reserved pasta cooking liquid; season with salt. Cook, tossing constantly and gradually pouring in more pasta cooking liquid until all 2 cups have been incorporated and a thick, glossy sauce forms, about 2 minutes. Remove pot from heat and mix ¼ cup finely chopped parsley, 2 Tbsp. fresh lemon juice, and pancetta into pasta; season with more salt and black pepper if needed. Divide among shallow bowls.

marinated-lamb-kebab-lezzet.name: Marinated Lamb Kebab
instructions: 1. Reject onion and tighten water.
2. Mix the juice of the onion, grated garlic, yogurt, keen, olive oil, salt and spices.
3. Add and mix meat.
4. Cover over with stretch film and marinate 3-4 hours in the refrigerator.
5. Cut the peppers to meat size.
6. Bottle respectively pepper, tomato and meat index.
7. Prepare all the swellings in the same way.
8. Bake for about 30-35 minutes in the grill or 180 degrees in the oven.
9. Add and serve the lava on the service plate, kebab on it, as well as grated bark and fine chopped onions.

marinated-sardines-recipe-comedera.name: Marinated Sardines Recipe

ingredients.item: 400 gr de sal gruesa o marina

instructions: Clean up the sardines. Take your scales and your old and your head.
Corta la sardina en filetes.
Una vez listas, lava muy bien y agrega en un bol con agua y hielo. Deja reposar por 40 minutos.
While sardines rest in cold water, in another bowl, mix thick salt, sugar and provenous herbs.
Cuando haya pasado los 40 minutos, retira la sardina del bol y escurre muy bien.
En una bandeja con tapa, coloca la mitad de la mezcla de sal y haz una capa.
Pon las sardinas en orden, y encima vierte el resto de sal. Esparce hasta que las cubra completamente.
Tapa la bandeja y deja reposar en la parte fresca de la nevera por unos 40 minutos para que cure.
Pela los dientes de ajo y filetea. Trocea el perejil.
Warm up a frying pan with some olive oil and spray your garlic teeth for a few minutes.
Apaga y vierte esta mezcla al resto del aceite de oliva. La idea es que tome el sabor del ajo.
Cuando las sardinas se hayan curado de la sal por los 40 minutos, retira  los filetes de la bandeja y lava para retirar el exceso de sal.
Seca las sardinas muy bien con papel absorbente.
Coloca las sardinas en un bol con el aceite de oliva saborizado con ajo, tapa y deja marinar por una hora aproximadamente en la parte fresca de la nevera.
To serve, put the sardines onto a plate, pour some of the oil where it marinated. He scares his chopped parsley and pits his lemon juice.
Enjoy!

marshmallow-creme-fruit-dip.name: Marshmallow Creme Fruit Dip
instructions: Stir cream cheese, marshmallow creme, orange juice concentrate, and nutmeg together in a bowl until completely combined.

mashed-potatoes-recipe-with-potato-chips.name: Mashed Potatoes Recipe With Potato Chips

Cooking till soft
Con un colador retira toda el agua

Mix till everything's well integrated

7.  Eti ilave edin.

melon-with-ham-and-gremolata-sauce-telec.name: Melon With Ham And Gremolata Sauce
melon-with-ham-and-gremolata-sauce-telec.original_name: Melão com presunto e molho gremolata

ingredients.item: 250 g  fatias de presunto de parma

instructions: Finely pinch the parsley and capers into a container. Add the raspberry and orange and lemon juice as well as the cubed cherry tomatoes.
Season with salt and pepper, water with plenty of olive oil and mix until the ingredients are well involved.
Peel the melon and cut it into cubes. On top of each one, put a slice of rolled ham and stick it with a toothpick. Serve with the gremolata sauce.

mexican-tamales-pequerecetas.name: Mexican Tamales

ingredients.item: 300 g mass of nixtamalised maize or special tamal flour (you can buy here)
3 green cups (about 200 g) (you can buy here)
1 or 2 fresh green chilies (matching with your hot suit)
12 to 15 sheets of dried maize (you can buy here)

instructions: First thing's to get the pilling ready. Eat 400 g of chicken breast in water with a pint of salt for about 20 minutes, till tender.
Once ready, scrape her, let her cool a little and scrape her with her hands or with two forks. Reserve the broth because then it'll serve you for the dough.

Meanwhile, make the green sauce. In a frying pan with a tablespoon of sunflower oil, pits 3 green cups cut into rooms, 1 garlic tooth, ¼ onion and 1 or 2 fresh green chilies - depending on how hot you feel - for a few minutes, till they start to get golden.
Pass everything to the beaker's glass, add some fresh cilantro leaves and some salt and tighten up and get a soft sauce. If it's too thick, you can add a chorrit of chicken cooking stock.
Mezcla el pollo desmenuzado con esta salsa y reserva.

For the dough, put in a bowl 300 g of nickel mass, 1 teaspoon baker powder and 1 teaspoon salt. Add 100 g of pork butter (or vegetable butter if you prefer) and start to work with your hands till it remains sandy.

It soon incorporates about 200 ml of broth, mixed up until the mass has a soft texture and can be extended without breaking. It should be clear and compact, something similar to a mass of soft cookies.
Before assembling the pits, put the dried maize leaves to be soaked in hot water for about 15 minutes, until they are soft and flexible. Take them and get them with a clean cloth.

To put together the pits, take a leaf of corn, put a generous tablespoon of mass (about 2 cm thick) into the centre, and spread with the back of a spoon and leave a free border around. On top, put a tablespoon of chicken with green sauce.
Fold one side of the leaf onto the pilling, then the other side, and finally fold the bottom up to close it. No need to tighten up, but they're closed up so they don't open up at high school.

Put the tamales into a vapor with a bending bottom. A cover and steam cook for about 60 to 70 minutes, and every once in a while they do not run out of water. You'll know they're ready when the dough takes off from the sheet.

Let them rest a few minutes before serving. Newly made are delicious but they can also be put in the refrigerator for a few days and heated by steam or microwave wrapped with the same leaves so they don't dry.

michael-whites-basic-pasta-dough.name: Michael White's Basic Pasta Dough
instructions: Whisk eggs and oil in a medium bowl. Whisk salt and 2 cups flour in a large bowl, make a well in the center, and pour egg mixture into well. Gradually incorporate flour mixture into egg mixture with a wooden spoon until a shaggy dough forms.

Turn out dough onto a lightly floured surface and knead, dusting lightly with more flour if sticky, until dough is smooth and fairly stiff, about 7 minutes. Wrap in plastic; let sit until dough holds an indentation when pressed with your finger, 1–2 hours.

Set a pasta maker to thickest setting. Dust dough lightly with flour and divide into 4 pieces. Working with 1 piece at a time and keeping remaining dough wrapped in plastic, flatten dough into a narrow rectangle (no wider than mouth of machine); pass through rollers. (Alternatively, flatten dough with a rolling pin.)

Fold dough as needed to fit and run through again. Repeat without folding, adjusting machine to a thinner setting after each pass and dusting dough with flour if sticky, until pasta sheet is 1/16" thick (setting 8 on most machines).
Place pasta sheets on a lightly floured surface.

Do Ahead: Dough can be made 1 day ahead; chill. Bring to room temperature (about 1 hour) before rolling out. Dough can be rolled out into sheets 4 hours ahead. Stack on a baking sheet between pieces of parchment paper; cover and chill.

micheladas.name: Micheladas
instructions: Combine hot sauce with lime juice in a shallow bowl. Spread coarse salt on a saucer. Dip rim of pint glasses into hot-sauce mixture and then into the salt to lightly coat. Fill each glass with ice cubes. After that it's just a matter of pouring in your favorite Mexican lager, a few squeezes of lime, and as many dashes of hot sauce as you can take.

microwave-bread-and-butter-pickles.name: Microwave Bread-and-butter Pickles
instructions: Stir sugar and vinegar together in a large microwave-safe bowl until sugar dissolved; stir in salt, mustard seeds, celery seeds, and turmeric. Stir in cucumbers and onion.
Microwave on high, stirring twice, until cucumbers are tender and onion is translucent, 7 to 8 minutes. Chill before serving.

microwave-quesadilla.name: Microwave Quesadilla
instructions: Place one tortilla on a microwave-safe plate. Sprinkle Cheddar cheese all over the tortilla. Top with second tortilla. Microwave until cheese is melted, 30 to 45 seconds.

milk-jam-and-chocolate-cake-lezzet.name: Milk Jam And Chocolate Cake
instructions: 1. Take a wide container of butter and powder sugar, rub it up until it comes to cream consistency with the help of mixer.
2. Add eggs and vanilla flour and cook for 2 minutes.
3. Add and knead flour, cocoa and coconut.
4. Shake the dough with oily paper and rest for 30 minutes in the refrigerator.
5. Finely open dough between oily paper.
6. 24 pieces with a shaped cookie mold, precise and oiled paper serial oven tray.
7. Bake for about 10-12 minutes until the brunette sprinkles sugar in the oven, heated in advance 180 degrees.
8. Remove milk jam over half of cookies, close them with other parts.
9. Serve cold.

milk-pie-with-semolina-argiro.name: Milk Pie With Semolina
instructions: In a pot with a thick base, add the milk with the sugar, lemon peel, vanilla and salt to heat.
Add the semolina, stirring with a wooden spoon and let it boil and fasten.
Turn off the heat, add the butter and mix to melt.
Beat the eggs with wire and add them stirring quickly so that they do not bake.
Remove the lemon peel.

minced-meat-pastry-lezzet.name: Minced Meat Pastry

ingredients.item: Half tablespoon tomato paste and pepper paste

instructions: 1. The flavor offers great recipes for your tea invitations.
2. Take a rough and mix of yeast with milk.
3. Add yogurt, eggs, sugar and olive oil and continue mixing.
4. Add and knead flour.
5. Cover over 1 hour.
6. Clean onions and tomatoes and chop small.
7. Clean and shore the pepper and parley.
8. Shallow, 1 cup of water, onion, stews, tomatoes, parsley, pepper, pepper, salt and red pepper, and knead.
9. Separate the dough into pieces and open in square shape.
10. Share tribute to the middle of the dough.
11. 11. 11. 11. Close the edges in the shape of the right bohçade.
12. thoroughly glue the edges of the dough with your fingers to not be opened.
12. August Take the sunflower oil into the pan and heat it.
14 July Get two sides of the beetles in the serving plate.
15. Serve hot.

minced-meat-spiral-pastry-lezzet.name: Minced Meat Spiral Pastry
instructions: 1. You are looking for special days.
2. roast the onion along with fine shore and mink.
3. Add and mix salt with pepper.
4. Mix the butter with milk or cream after melting in a pan.
5. Cool to a yufkayi kitchen countertop.
6. Broadcast butter milk (or cream) on it.
7. Transfer from mined mortar to a edge.
8. Wrap the Yufka from both ends.
9. Place the oiled round oven tray in the middle, from the ground grain you prepared, curl out from the inside.
10. Take a big round with the other three pifkayi in the same way with the meat of the meat of the tray.
11. 11. Cook the egg yolk on the oven with a set of 180 degrees.
12. You can do your bör with cheese, potatoes, zucchini or season grass with the same method.

mini-mushroom-spinach-quiche.name: Mini Mushroom & Spinach Quiche
instructions: Prepare muffin tins with cooking spray and preheat the oven 177°C.
Heat oil in a large skillet on medium high heat.
Stir and cook mushrooms until softened,  then add onion and garlic to this. Once combined and onions are cooked through, add spinach and cook for another 3 minutes.
Remove from heat and set vegetable medley aside.
In a separate large bowl at room temperature, whisk in eggs, milk, Dijon mustard, and salt and pepper. To this, stir in cheese and mushroom mixture.
Take a ladle and fill each sprayed muffin cup with prepared mixture.
Place in the oven and bake for 30 to 40 minutes or until cooked through (toothpick inserted comes out clean).
Serve warm and enjoy.

miso-oats-with-egg-and-avocado.name: Miso Oats With Egg And Avocado

ingredients.item: To 2 tbsp. toasted black or white sesame seeds

instructions: Place the oats in a saucepan, add the stock and bring to a boil. Reduce the heat to low and place the lid on slightly ajar, then cook for about 15 minutes, until the oats have reached a porridge consistency. Turn off the heat and gradually stir in the miso paste, a little at a time, until it has dissolved into the oats. Taste and season with salt if needed.

Bring a separate saucepan of water to the boil, then add the eggs. Set the timer for 6 minutes for soft yolks, 7 minutes for “jammy” eggs, and 8 to 9 minutes for hard-boiled eggs. When your timer goes off, drain the eggs immediately and either rinse them under cold running water or place in an ice bath until they are completely cold. Peel and cut in half.
Ladle the oats into bowls and top with the boiled eggs, scallions, avocado, and sesame seeds. Season with a small pinch of sea salt and serve immediately.

mixed-berry-skillet-cobbler.name: Mixed Berry Skillet Cobbler
instructions: Preheat your oven to 350ºF (180ºC).
In a cast-iron skillet over medium-low heat, add the berries, sugar, cornstarch, and lemon juice.
Mix to combine and stir for 5-10 minutes until the mixture starts to thicken.
Let simmer for 5 minutes on low heat.
Sprinkle the box cake mix over the berry filling.
Distribute the butter evenly over the top to ensure even baking.
Bake for 45 minutes to an hour, until the top is golden brown.
Serve warm with ice cream.
Enjoy!

mixed-berry-tiramisu-with-lime-curd.name: Mixed-berry Tiramisù With Lime Curd

ingredients.prep: green part only; shaved with vegetable peeler
Boudoirs, or Champagne biscuits; do not use soft ladyfingers)*

instructions:
Combine blueberries, raspberries, blackberries, powdered sugar, and ½ cup water in large saucepan. Bring to simmer, stirring until sugar dissolves. Reduce heat to medium and simmer until berries are soft but still intact, stirring occasionally, about 8 minutes. Transfer mixture to large bowl; stir in lime juice. Cool to room temperature. Stir strawberries into berry mixture. Chill until cold, about 4 hours.
Do Ahead: Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and keep chilled.

Combine ⅓ cup water, ⅓ cup sugar, and lime peel strips in small saucepan. Bring to boil over medium heat, stirring until sugar dissolves. Pour syrup into bowl. Cool to room temperature; discard lime peel.

Using pastry brush, brush ladyfingers on both sides with syrup. Arrange in single layer in 13x9x2-inch glass baking dish, cutting to fit and covering bottom of dish completely. Pour chilled berry mixture over.

Combine mascarpone and cream in large bowl. Using electric mixer, beat until smooth and slightly thickened (do not overbeat or mixture may curdle). Add lime curd; beat just until blended. Drop mascarpone topping by large spoonfuls over berry mixture. Spread evenly, covering berries completely. Cover and chill at least 8 hours.

Spoon tiramisù into bowls and serve.
Do Ahead: Mascarpone topping can be made 1 day ahead. Keep chilled.

mojo-meatballs.name: Mojo Meatballs

ingredients.item: Cooked white rice and plantain chips

instructions: Place a rack in lower third of oven; preheat to 500°. Set aside ½ cup cilantro for making the sauce; finely chop remaining ½ cup cilantro. Lightly beat egg in a medium bowl to blend. Add panko, cumin, 1 Tbsp. oil, 2 tsp. sugar, and 1½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 tsp. Morton kosher salt and stir until panko softens and turns pasty. Finely grate 3 garlic cloves and 1 chile into mixture, add chopped cilantro, and mix well to combine. Using your hands, mix in pork until evenly distributed.
Toss onions with 1 Tbsp. oil on a large rimmed baking sheet; season with salt and pepper. Roast until wedges are well charred underneath, about 10 minutes.
While the onions are cooking, divide pork mixture into eight pieces and roll each into a 2”-diameter ball.

Using a metal spatula, turn onion wedges over and scoot them toward edges of baking sheet to make room for meatballs. Arrange meatballs in the center, spacing out evenly. Return baking sheet to oven and roast until meatballs are browned and spring back when gently pressed and onions are well charred on the other side, about 10 minutes.

Meanwhile, remove stem from remaining chile and split in half lengthwise. Place in a blender and add orange juice, lime juice, reserved ½ cup cilantro, remaining garlic clove, ⅓ cup oil, 2 tsp. sugar, and 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt; blend until mostly smooth but still specked with herbs. Transfer sauce to a small bowl.
Divide rice among bowls and top with meatballs and onions, then plantain chips and more cilantro sprigs. Serve with sauce alongside.

mojo-style-black-bean-and-rice-bowl.name: Mojo-style Black Bean And Rice Bowl
instructions: Mix rice with water and a dash of salt in a 4-quart saucepan; bring to a boil. Stir, cover, reduce heat, and let simmer until tender, 40 to 45 minutes.

At the same time, drain most of the liquid from the beans and combine with onion and cayenne in a small saucepan. Bring to a simmer and cook, covered, 15 to 20 minutes. Add cilantro and lime juice, stir, and remove from heat.

Combine garlic and salt for sauce in a small bowl; mash together to form a paste. Add garlic paste to sliced onion, olive oil, lemon juice, orange juice, and cumin in an electric blender and process until smooth. Transfer to a small nonstick skillet and simmer, stirring regularly and taking care not to burn, for 5 minutes.
Layer 1 cup of rice, 2 to 3 tablespoons mojo Cubano, 3/4 cup black beans, a generous sprinkling of Cheddar cheese, salsa, and a dollop of sour cream in a large bowl. Repeat for each serving.

mrs-ocallaghans-soda-bread.name: Mrs. O'callaghan's Soda Bread
instructions: Preheat oven to 218°C. Spray heavy baking sheet with nonstick spray. Whisk both flours, sugar, and baking soda in medium bowl to blend. Add margarine and cut in until margarine is reduced to pea-size pieces. Add buttermilk; stir until shaggy dough forms. Turn dough out onto lightly floured work surface. Knead until dough comes together, about 10 turns. Shape dough into 9-inch round (the round should be about 1 inch high). Place dough on prepared baking sheet. Cut large X, 1/2 inch deep, in top of dough, almost all the way to the edges of the round.

Bake bread in center of oven until deep brown and bottom sounds hollow when firmly tapped (a bamboo skewer inserted into the center of the bread should emerge clean without any stickiness or moistness), about 55-60 minutes. Transfer bread to rack and cool completely.

muffaletta-dip.name: Muffaletta Dip
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Combine stuffed olives, black olives, and Italian dressing together in a bowl. Mix cream cheese, mozzarella cheese, ham, and salami together in a separate bowl. Spread cheese mixture into a pie plate.
Bake in the preheated oven until bubbling, 15 to 20 minutes. Top dip with olive mixture.

mushroom-oven-pasta-recipe-lezzet.name: Mushroom Oven Pasta Recipe

mushroom-miso-pasta.name: Mushroom-miso Pasta
instructions: Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Cook spaghetti in the boiling water, stirring occasionally, until tender yet firm to the bite, about 12 minutes.
Meanwhile, melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat. Add mushrooms but do not crowd the skillet. Brown mushrooms in butter, about 7 minutes. Add miso paste.

Carefully ladle out 1/2 cup pasta water from the boiling pot. Pour 1/4 cup pasta water to the pan with the mushrooms, stirring until incorporated. Add Parmesan cheese and whisk until cheese has melted. Add remaining 1/4 cup pasta water.
Drain cooked pasta and add to the skillet. Toss to combine and serve immediately.
